title: fix: Fix parameter mismatch in EPUBBookLoaderHelper.translate_with_ba…
body:
## Problem
The `translate_with_backoff` method in `EPUBBookLoaderHelper` class was raising TypeError because of parameter mismatch between the method signature and actual calls through the backoff decorator.

Error message:
TypeError: EPUBBookLoaderHelper.translate_with_backoff() takes 1 positional argument but 3 were given

## Solution
1. Modified the method signature to properly handle parameters:
   - Added explicit parameters for text and context_flag
   - Added jitter=None to backoff decorator
   
2. Improved error handling and logging
#bug

step_plan.summary: Fix the TypeError by changing EPUBBookLoaderHelper.translate_with_backoff to accept positional arguments (text, context_flag=False), add jitter=None to the backoff decorator, and add try/except logging with re-raise plus coercion of None to an empty string.

steps.operation: Change translate_with_backoff signature, update backoff decorator, add robust error handling and return coercion
steps.reason: Call sites (EPUBBookLoaderHelper.deal_new) invoke translate_with_backoff with positional args (text, context_flag). The current method used **kwargs only, causing TypeError when positional args are passed. Updating the signature to accept (self, text, context_flag=False) fixes the mismatch. Adding jitter=None to the backoff.on_exception decorator makes retry behavior explicit and avoids jitter-related warnings. Wrapping the translator call in try/except lets us log truncated text on failure and re-raise so the backoff decorator can retry. Coercing None to '' ensures callers that expect strings (e.g., shorter_result_link) receive a valid string.
steps.side_effects: Behavioral: Callers that already pass positional args (e.g., deal_new) will work correctly; callers that previously relied on a permissive **kwargs signature (passing other unexpected keyword args) may break. Backoff: adding jitter=None changes randomness characteristics slightly but retains retry behavior. Error handling: exceptions will be logged with truncated input and re-raised to allow retries; if retries are exhausted the exception still propagates. Return value: None from translate_model.translate is coerced to empty string, preventing downstream TypeErrors but may hide translator failures if callers expected None. Tests: unit/integration tests around EPUB loader, translation, and shorter_result_link should be run/updated. API impact: no external API changes beyond the method signature internal to the class, but search for other callers is recommended to avoid regressions.
